scripts.db:setup: npm run db:migrate:local -w @nutripro/worker && npx wrangler d1 execute nutripro-db --local --file=apps/worker/seed.sql -c apps/worker/wrangler.toml
scripts.dev:all: npm run db:setup && turbo run dev --parallel
scripts.start:all: npm run db:setup && turbo run build && turbo run start --parallel
